input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A static clevver NEWS logo appears in white against vertical teal and blue stripes. Between frames, a bright cyan glow emerges around the text edges, illuminating the letters. Background lighting intensifies to match the new luminous effect surrounding the graphic.</think><answer></answer>

[4-6] The scene shifts outdoors to a street where a blonde female in a black crop top and shorts walks beside a redhead in black and a male in a black polo shirt, while a female in sunglasses and a denim jacket looks down in the foreground. [6-8] The group continues along a sunny sidewalk past a female in a purple patterned dress holding a white smartphone and a black SUV in traffic. [8-10] Finally, five males in black suits stand on a red carpet before a "BRIT AWARDS 2014" and "MasterCard" backdrop, surrounded by cameras and a "Capital FM" microphone.

[14-16] A split-screen studio setting appears. On the left, a blonde female wearing black-rimmed glasses and a pink top stands before a blue background, with a lower third displaying "MISTY KINGMA" and a Twitter handle. On the right, a static photo shows a blonde female and bearded male holding a fluffy grey cat. [16-18] The presenter gestures with open hands as the lower third updates to the headline "ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!" in teal and white capital letters. [18-22] She clasps her hands in front of her waist while speaking. The right-side image remains constant, featuring the "clevver NEWS" logo above the headline text.

recent_thinks: [10-12] Four females walk arm-in-arm down a sidewalk, wearing a grey coat, maroon coat, black coat with checkered pants, and a white suit. A person in a purple coat stands left taking a photo. Behind them, a storefront window displays text. The clevver NEWS watermark remains in the bottom right corner.

[12-14] The four females continue walking arm-in-arm along the pavement while the person in the purple coat remains on the left. A heavy white fade effect overtakes the screen, progressively obscuring the group and the background storefront window until the image becomes nearly completely white.

[22-24] The blonde presenter in the pink top unclasps her hands and gestures outward with palms facing up while speaking. The split-screen layout persists, displaying the static photo of the couple holding a cat on the right side. The lower third banner continues to show the teal headline text "ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!" against the black background.

[24-26] The studio shot cuts to a static graphic of an Instagram profile page with the username "niazkilam". A grid of photos displays a teepee, a person tattooing a leg, a concert crowd, and a male portrait. The "clevver NEWS" logo remains visible in the bottom right corner overlaying the social media interface.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A static "clevver NEWS" logo appears in white against vertical teal and blue stripes, developing a bright cyan glow around the text edges. [2-4] Following a bright white flash, a male figure with dark hair wearing a black leather jacket, white t-shirt, and backward black cap stands indoors near framed walls as the logo becomes a bottom-right watermark. [4-6] The scene shifts outdoors to a street where a blonde female in a black crop top and shorts walks beside a redhead in black and a male in a black polo shirt, while a female in sunglasses and a denim jacket looks down in the foreground. [6-8] The group continues along a sunny sidewalk past a female in a purple patterned dress holding a white smartphone and a black SUV in traffic. [8-10] Finally, five males in black suits stand on a red carpet before a "BRIT AWARDS 2014" and "MasterCard" backdrop, surrounded by cameras and a "Capital FM" microphone. [14-16] A split-screen studio setting appears. On the left, a blonde female wearing black-rimmed glasses and a pink top stands before a blue background, with a lower third displaying "MISTY KINGMA" and a Twitter handle. On the right, a static

[42-44] A split-screen broadcast features a blonde presenter in a pink top and glasses on the left, gesturing with open palms. On the right, a photo shows a male in a grey Mickey Mouse sweater and a female in a beanie posing before a castle, with a teal banner below reading "ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!" and the "clevver NEWS" logo. [44-46] The view cuts to a full-screen image of five males on a blue carpet with "Teen Choice 2013" text, followed by a white flash transition to four females posing before a "Capital FM" backdrop in varied outfits including a white checkered suit and red patterned pants. [46-52] The broadcast returns to the split-screen layout with the presenter on the left and a new photo on the right showing a male kissing a female with pink hair on the cheek. The presenter shifts gestures from open hands to clasped hands, then gestures near her chest as diagonal white and grey bars overlay the screen for a transition, while the "ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!" banner remains fixed at the bottom.

[52-60] A black-and-white Instagram post fills the screen, featuring a tattooed man touching his temple. The username 'niazkilam' and caption "Blah" appear above a comment section, with text indicating "167k others like this." The 'clevver NEWS' logo is visible in the bottom right corner. At 58s, a teal diagonal transition graphic begins wiping across from the left. [60-62] The scene shifts to a split-screen news segment. On the left, a blonde woman wearing glasses and a pink dress gestures while speaking. On the right, a photo displays the man in a black leather jacket. A teal banner at the bottom reads "ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!".

From 62-66s, the split-screen layout remains constant with the blonde presenter in a pink dress and glasses gesturing on the left. On the right, a static image shows a man with dark hair in a black leather jacket. The teal banner at the bottom displays "ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!" next to the logo. At 66s, the broadcast transitions to a full-screen close-up of a shirtless man with dark hair and a beard lying down. Visible tattoos cover his chest and shoulder as he looks toward the camera. The "clevver NEWS" logo stays in the bottom right. Through 70s, the video maintains this close-up of the shirtless male with dark hair and beard. Intricate tattoos are visible across his chest and left shoulder as he gazes forward, with the "clevver NEWS" logo fixed in the bottom right corner.

[72-74] A bright white and purple flash overtakes a previous shot of a shirtless male with tattoos, revealing a faint blurry rectangular graphic in the center while the "clevver NEWS" logo remains in the bottom right. [74-78] A social media profile interface resolves against a blurry purple background, displaying a black-and-white photo of a dark-haired male with a beard beside the username "niazkilam" and a blue "Follow" button in a static centered shot. [78-80] The scene cuts to a photograph of three people outdoors on grass, showing a woman in denim overalls, a man in a red beanie and plaid shirt holding a young girl in a pink jacket, with trees and white structures in the background.

recent_thinks: [10-12] Four females walk arm-in-arm down a sidewalk, wearing a grey coat, maroon coat, black coat with checkered pants, and a white suit. A person in a purple coat stands left taking a photo. Behind them, a storefront window displays text. The clevver NEWS watermark remains in the bottom right corner.

[12-14] The four females continue walking arm-in-arm along the pavement while the person in the purple coat remains on the left. A heavy white fade effect overtakes the screen, progressively obscuring the group and the background storefront window until the image becomes nearly completely white.

[70-72] The video maintains a static full-screen close-up of a shirtless male with dark hair and a beard lying down. Intricate tattoos remain visible across his chest and left shoulder as he gazes forward. The "clevver NEWS" logo stays fixed in the bottom right corner over the image.

[80-82] A static photograph shows three individuals standing on a grassy lawn. On the left, a woman with long blonde hair wears denim overalls over a white blouse. In the center, a man wearing a red beanie and plaid shirt holds a young girl dressed in a pink jacket and blue jeans. Trees and white structures appear in the background.

[82-84] The static photograph persists, showing a woman in denim overalls on the left and a man in a red beanie holding a child in a pink jacket on the right. They stand on a grassy lawn with trees and white structures in the background. The "clevver NEWS" logo remains in the bottom right corner.

queries.question: What headline text is displayed in blue during the studio segment? A. BRIT AWARDS 2014 B. ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?! C. MISTY KINGMA D. CAPITAL FM

[12-14] The four females continue walking arm-in-arm along the pavement while the person in the purple coat remains on the left. A heavy white fade effect overtakes the screen, progressively obscuring the group and the background storefront window until the image becomes nearly completely white.

[70-72] The video maintains a static full-screen close-up of a shirtless male with dark hair and a beard lying down. Intricate tattoos remain visible across his chest and left shoulder as he gazes forward. The "clevver NEWS" logo stays fixed in the bottom right corner over the image.

[96-98] Diagonal purple stripes wipe across the frame, revealing a split-screen layout. On the left, a blonde woman in a pink dress and glasses gestures while speaking. On the right, a static image shows a hand wearing a large diamond ring against black fabric. A teal banner at the bottom displays the text "ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!" next to the logo.

queries.question: What color is the sleeveless top worn by the woman with glasses in the studio scene? A. Grey B. Black C. Light pink D. White

samples.output: <think>The split-screen layout persists. On the left, the blonde presenter in a pink dress continues speaking and moves her hands slightly while gesturing. On the right, the static image of a hand with a large ring on black fabric remains fixed. The lower banner text "ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!" is unchanged.</think><answer></answer>
